transcript.clean_text: the town of chateau on the outskirts of paris was the venue for the final stage of the 108th tour of france champions past present and about to be crowned alongside green jersey wearers looking to confirm that prize lined up at the start 108 kilometers on the clock then to be ridden at processional pace until reaching paris and once in the french capital the now usual eight laps of the champs-elysees and an expected sprint to decide the final stage and the day began with the usual celebrations a yellow jersey team a special kit about to win his second tour de france all backed up by his uae emirates team mates jonas vinger gore was there ready to finish in second place andre greipel shaking the hands of rivals as he rode his last ever tour stage having announced 24 hours previous that he would retire from the sport at the end of the year the eiffel tower the french capital for one last time for him then and as the peliton hit the final 50k to serve the race they reach the champs-elysees at its famous finish line for the first time no cena had the yellow jersey cross to reclaim the crowds we had the first attack jonas rich going up the road quickly a group of 13 getting away that turned into four and that will be the first of a couple of breakaway groups the maximum gap they get will be about 30 seconds bisigger would then be away a couple of riders coming with him and at the intermediate sprints mark cavadish looking very very good not quite mathematically confirming his green jersey win but the big favorite now against michael matthews the french colors were omnipresent the attackers were trying to get away the kerning quickstep the team that everybody was leaning on to try and control things another trio went away they get around 20 seconds an israel startup nation would contribute to make sure we have a sprint well under the final lap it would all be brought back together the last chance for attacks didn't really work out and the kernic quickstep took control as the riders raced to the underpass for the final time wildfernat will be there alongside mark candice jasper phillips as well and inside the final kilometer cavendish seemed to lose his lead outman miguel merkel a couple of places off to the right hand side mike turners are doing a great job for walt fernat phillips are waiting on his wheel cavendish in the green kypel was there as well but once watfornaut hit the front cavendish would be boxed in and nobody would be able to come around no 35th record breaking win for mark caverdish he would take the green jersey what for not though still in the headlines and what a hat trick the belgian champion proving himself to be one of the men of the tour a mountain stage on fontu a time trial 24 hours before this and a win on the famous champs-elysees his team's fourth stage win of the race his third and jumbo visma despite losing primoz roglich and finishing with four having a great tour ua emirates absolutely exceptional taday pogachar defending his title as the stage winner with little mr fanart celebrated on the champs-elysees fanart beating philips cavendish mesgets and greipel kavadish taking the green jersey fanart winning the stage and the final podium with karapas the first ever man from ecuador in third wingergor the first dane in 25 years up there and yet again for the second year in succession today pogaccha winning the tour de france five minutes 20 his margin of victory richard karapas at 703 down with o'connor finishing fourth a superb way to make your debut and wilco kelderman achieving a top five as mentioned cavendish took a green jersey first for 10 years canvas alongside today pogaccha who also took the king of the mountains prize and the white jersey france on his tour debut took the most aggressive rider prize and bahrain victorious the best team award and on an evening on the sports most famous avenue the sun set on the 108th tour de france too much national fanfare but international recognition for the show put on over three weeks from brittany to paris what a tour de france
